title: 世話を焼くのは嫌いじゃねえ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm walking around the town with
Inari One...
Hey, Inari!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yooo! Inari! Inari! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The person running up to Inari One is Twin
Turbo—her roommate in the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, Turbo! You're out and about on the
town too?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And whaddaya mean "perfect timin'"?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I came out here looking for some fun, but it's
boring by myself. But now you're here!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: So, come play with me! Pleeeaaase!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So, that's what's goin on. Aaaall right, fiiine! I
know ya won't take no for an answer anyhow.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss, I know this is all of a sudden, but is it
cool if we hang out with her?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss, I know this is all of a sudden, but is it
cool if we hang out with her?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heheh. Thanks for the snappy answer.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! I get to hang out with Inari! Let's hurry and
go somewhere then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Twin Turbo leads us to an arcade.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Heeey! Inari! Let's play this one! No—wait! This
one!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm not used to these kinda games. Seein' as
you're here, how 'bout you decide for us, Boss?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm not used to these kinda games. Seein' as
you're here, how 'bout you decide for us, Boss?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of the two games Twin Turbo wants to play,
the one that seems the most interesting is...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's kinda like a shootin' gallery, right? I should
be able to manage, then.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Wait just a sec there, Turbo! Don't tell me
that's a...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yep! It's a zombie shooter! My favorite!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gah... It's that creepy game with the never-endin'
swarms, right? Oh... Ya just had to pick the worst
one first!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I'm awesome at it, so just leave it to me! I've got
your back!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Haha... How reassurin'.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Get away from me, ya nasty freaks! I said
get away! There's too many of 'em!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that?! I'm so awesome! Take this! And
this! Graaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both Inari One and Twin Turbo seem extremely
immersed in the game. Eventually...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... This might be even more tirin' than runnin'! Crazy...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! That was so much fun! You were shouting
the whole time!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hey, let's do that one next, Inari! That one over
there!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You're bouncin' off the walls. Is this really
that fun for ya?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause you're here to play with me, Inari! You
always go all out! That's why you're the best!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Inari! Let's get a move on!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Geez, she's so straightforward. If I had a li'l sis, I
wonder if she'd be like Turbo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch a glimpse of Inari One's sisterly side as she
has fun hanging out with Twin Turbo.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, looks like a game where ya gotta get the
pucks into the other player's goal. A real
one-on-one showdown... could be interestin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Turbo! Prepare yourself, 'cause I won't be holdin'
back!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh! No worries, I'm the best at this game! I'm
gonna beat you black and blue!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Bring it on! Let's see whatcha got!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: TAAAKE THIS! SUPER TURBO SHOT!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hah! Your moves are too easy to read! Now, it's my turn!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: No way! TURBO HYPER GUAAARD!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Is dual wieldin' legal?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One and Twin Turbo exchange an intense
rally during their air hockey match.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, who woulda thought we'd tie at no score!
Well played, Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
You're pretty good too, Inari! Almost as strong as
me! I'll recognize you as my rival!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Haha, much obliged!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hey, let's do that one next, Inari! That one over
there!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You're bouncin' off the walls. Is this really
that fun for ya?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause you're here to play with me, Inari! You
always go all out! That's why you're the best!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Inari! Let's get a move on!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Geez, she's so straightforward. If I had a li'l sis, I
wonder if she'd be like Turbo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch a glimpse of Inari One's sisterly side as she
has fun hanging out with Twin Turbo.
